publicationStmt.authority: HANSEL: Human-Accessible NLP-ready Sanskrit E-text Library

p.ref: Distributed by HANSEL under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International License.

licence.p:
Under this licence, you are free to:
Share — copy and redistribute the material in any medium or format.
Adapt — remix, transform, and build upon the material.

list.item: Attribution — You must give appropriate credit, provide a link to the license, and indicate if changes were made. You may do so in any reasonable manner, but not in any way that suggests the licensor endorses you or your use.
NonCommercial — You may not use the material for commercial purposes.
ShareAlike — If you remix, transform, or build upon the material, you must distribute your contributions under the same license as the original.
No additional restrictions — You may not apply legal terms or technological measures that legally restrict others from doing anything the license permits.

licence.p: See the Creative Commons site for full details.
HANSEL assumes no responsibility for unauthorised use that infringes rights.

editorialDecl.p: I (T. Neill) produced this HANSEL edition. I first manually extracted T. Richard's submitted Word document to plain-text, then added basic structural markup (page breaks, tabbed verses, marking of stage directions and Prakrit). Next, I re-OCRed the PDF (Cloud Vision and Sarvam Vision auto-harmonized with Gemini 2.5 Flash) to recover line-break information, then merged this information into the structured transcript. Finally, I interviewed T. Richard for much of the metadata (the Work Description is entirely his) and ingested the data into HANSEL. T. Richard and I then proofread the text (both Prakrit and Sanskrit, including chāyā) together in a collegial read-through over coffee, during which we added word separation. As in other HANSEL drama texts so far, I have artificially rendered the "nepathye" stage directions as speaker identification.

The source edition is printed in Devanāgarī; the electronic text uses lossless IAST transliteration. IAST differs slightly from ISO 15919; conversion can be achieved via:
ṛ → r̥
ḷ → l̥
ḻ → ḷ
ṃ → ṁ
e → ē
o → ō

Corrections and uncertainties:
Replacement: before after
Deletion:
Addition:
Unclear:

revisionDesc.change: Manually transcribed the edition and formatted as a Google Doc.
Exported Google Doc as Word doc and processed for HANSEL.

lg.l:
kalā cāndrī śaṃbhoḥ praṇayakalahaprāpitaruṣaḥ
praṇāme pārvatyāḥ padakamalalākṣāparicitā |

śriyai bhūyādasyāḥ vadanaśaśinaḥ kopakaluṣā
tprasādenāruṇyaṃ vinimayavaśeneva dadhatī || 1 ||

p.seg: ajja, iaṃ mhi | ko ṇioo āṇavedu |ārya, iyamasmi | ko niyoga ājñāpayatu |

sp.speaker: sūtradhāraḥ
sp.p:
adya khalvādiṣṭo'smi vimalataranijakīrtikarpūrakaraṇḍī
kṛtanikhilabrahmāṇḍena digantadantāvalakumbhamaṇḍalamaṇḍanāyamānapratāpasi
ndūreṇa sakalakalākalāpakovidena vidyāraṇyaśrīcaraṇāravindavandanamahotsa
vamilitenāmunā sāmājikena, yathā —

p.seg:
bahuviṇṇāṇakusalo kkhu eso sabhājaṇo | kahaṃ
se hiaaṃ āvajjiduṃ sakkhiadi |bahuvijñānakuśalaḥ khalveṣa sabhājanaḥ | kathamasya hṛdayamāvarjayituṃ śakyate |

sp.speaker: sūtradhāraḥ
sp.p:
mā maivaṃ vaktavyam | viśeṣajñānāmeva guṇagrāhitā naisa
rgikī | ataste sukhamāvarjanīyāḥ | śṛṇu |

lg.l: vijñānaviśadameva hi cetaḥ sujanasya śakyate hartum |

p.seg: hodu | jaṃ aṇantarakaraṇijjaṃ taṃ ajjo ṇirūvedu |bhavatu | yadanantarakaraṇīyaṃ tadāryo nirūpayatu |

lg.l:
mākandāliṃ malayapavanā mandamāndolayante
majjatyasyā madhukarayuvā mañjarīṇāṃ marande |

āsevante mukulanikarānāsamantādaśokā
vaktuṃ mattāḥ pikayuvatayaḥ pañcamaṃ prārabhante || 4 ||
jassa hi mahū amacco dakkhiṇapavaṇo varūhiṇīṇāho |
piabhamarāṇuaro so jedu ciraṃ vammaho rāo || 5 ||
yasya hi madhuramātyo dakṣiṇapavano varūthinīnāthaḥ | priyabhramarānucaraḥ sa jayatu ciraṃ manmatho rājā ||

sp.speaker: sūtradhāraḥ
sp.p: sādhu gītam | anyato'valokya | ārye, itaḥ paśya |

lg.l: latāntarāṇyeti madhuvratāliḥ sītā yatheyaṃ kusumeṣu lobhāt || 6 ||

p.stage: tataḥ praviśati puṣpāvacayaṃ nāṭayantī sītā sakhī ca |

p.seg:
halā jāṇai, aggado evva kusumāiṃ dīsandi | kiṃ aṇṇado
diṇṇadiṭṭhī gacchasi |sakhi jānaki, agrata eva kusumāni dṛśyante | kimanyato dattadṛṣṭirgacchasi |

halā mahuarie, ido vi puraṭṭhide kāṇaṇantare maṇoharāiṃ
kusumāiṃ dīsandi | tā ahilāseṇa gacchami |sakhi madhukarike, ito'pi puraḥsthite kānanāntare manoharāṇi kusumāni dṛśyante | tasmādabhilāṣeṇa gacchāmi |

halā jāṇai, dāṇiṃ vi amhāṇaṃ aparicido padeso |
kāṇaṇesu sāvāṇuggahasamatthā isiṇo ciṭṭhanti | ado jassiṃ kassiṃ vi
assame kusumesu gahidesu jo ko vi kuppai | rāmabhaddo vi tuha piaṃ kāduṃ
kaṇaamia geṇhia miaāvāvārādo dāṇiṃ evva ṇivaṭṭissadi | tā
ettiehiṃ kusumehiṃ ṇivattemo |sakhi jānaki, idānīmapyasmākamaparicitaḥ pradeśaḥ | kānaneṣu śāpānugrahasamarthā ṛṣayastiṣṭhanti | ato yasminakasminnapyāśrame kusumeṣu gṛhīteṣu yaḥ ko'pi kupyati | rāmabhadro'pi tava priyaṃ kartuṃ kanakamṛgaṃ gṛhītvā mṛgayāvyāpārādidānīmeva nivartiṣyate | tasmādetāvadbhiḥ kusumairnivartāvahe |

savvajaṇasāhāraṇāiṃ kkhu vaṇaladāiṃ phalapupphamūlāiṃ ṇaīja
lāiṃ a | ado kiṃṇimittaṃ jo ko vi kuppadi | puṣpabhājanaṃ vilokya | a
jjauttassa devvaccaṇopajuttāiṃ kusumāiṃ pajjattāiṃ | ido puraṭṭhide kāṇaṇantare
maṇoharāiṃ kusumāiṃ ahigeṇhia uḍaaṃ gacchamho |sarvajanasādhāraṇāni khalu vanalatāḥ phalapuṣpamūlāni nadījalāni ca | ataḥ kiṃnimittaṃ yaḥ ko'pi kupyati | āryaputrasya devārcanopayuktāni kusumāni paryāptāni | itaḥ puraḥsthite kānanāntare manoharāṇi kusumānyabhigṛhyoṭajaṃ gacchāvaḥ |

halā, ido bhamaro kiṃṇimittaṃ saṃbhamanto desu
desu ladāviḍavesu kusumakoḍaresu āluṭhanto paribbhamai |sakhi, ito bhramaraḥ kiṃnimittaṃ saṃbhramaṃsteṣu teṣu latāviṭapeṣu kusumakoṭareṣvāluṭhanparibhramati |

halā, maarandapāṇaṇiccalapakkhadāe palla
vantaridaṃ imaṃ sahaariṃ bhamariṃ avekkhanto aviloaṇaveaṇāe ṇūṇaṃ u
mmatto saṃvutto |sakhi, makarandapānaniścalapakṣatayā pallavāntaritāmimāṃ sahacarīṃ bhramarīmaprekṣamāṇo'vilokanavedanayā nūnamunmattaḥ saṃvṛttaḥ |
vilokya | halā, sāhu lakkhidaṃ tue |sakhi, sādhu lakṣitaṃ tvayā |

amhahe | savisesaṃ paribbhamanto vi eso sahaariṃ ṇa
pekkhadi |āścaryam | saviśeṣaṃ paribhramannapyeṣa sahacarīṃ na paśyati |
mahuarie, saṃjojehi ṇam |madhukarike, saṃyojayainam |

imiṇā sahaāradaṇḍena mañjariṃ tāḍia maarandapāṇa
ṇiccalaṃ bhamariṃ uṭṭhāvemi | tathā kṛtvā | amhahe | mañjarīe uṭṭhidāe tāe
sahaarīe saṃgado imo mahuaro māhavīmaṇḍavaṃ ahiruhia mahurasaṃ pi
banto suhaṃ vaṭṭai | vanāntaraṃ vilokya sāvegam | kahiṃ gadā jāṇaī | puna
rvilokya | amhahe | ṇa kassiṃ vi dīsai | vanāntaraṃ praviśya sarvatrānviṣyantī |
amhahe | iaṃ maṇoharākidī kā vi hariṇī siṇiddhāe diṭṭhie maṃ pekkhia
ṇissarantehiṃ ṇaaṇasalilehiṃ sahīsiṇehaṃ sūaadi | maha hiaaṃ vi
edassiṃ ciraparicidaṃ via vissaddhaṃ hodi | ahavā imāe jaṇaṇantarasa
hīe hodavvam | iti sasaṃbhramaṃ paribhramantī savimarśam | ettha mahesiṇo a
ssamappahāvādo duṭṭhamiāṇaṃ saṃcāro ṇatthi | tā kahiṃ patthidā jāṇaitti me
accariaṃ hodi | niḥśvasya | mandabhāiṇī ahaṃ khu | miaāvāvārādo ṇi
uttassa rāmabhaddassa kahaṃ kahaissam | rāmabhaddo vi suṇia kīrisaṃ avattha
ntaraṃ aṇuhavissaditti vevai me hiaam |anena sahakāradaṇḍena mañjarīṃ tāḍayitvā makarandapānaniścalāṃ bhramarīmutthāpayāmi | āścaryam | mañjaryā utthitayā tayā sahacaryā saṃgato'yaṃ madhukaro mādhavīmaṇḍapamadhiruhya madhurasaṃ pibansukhaṃ vartate | kutra gatā jānakī | āścaryam | na kutrāpi dṛśyate | āścaryam | iyaṃ manoharākṛtiḥ kāpi hariṇī snigdhayā dṛṣṭyā māṃ dṛṣṭvā niḥsaradbhirnayanasalilaiḥ sakhīsnehaṃ sūcayati | mama hṛdayamapyetasyāṃ ciraparicitamiva visrabdhaṃ bhavati | athavānayā jananāntarasakhyā bhavitavyam | atra maharṣerāśramaprabhāvādduṣṭamṛgāṇāṃ saṃcāro nāsti | tasmātkutra prasthitā jānakīti ma āścaryaṃ bhavati | mandabhāginyahaṃ khalu | mṛgayāvyāpārānnivṛttasya rāmabhadrasya kathaṃ kathayiṣye | rāmabhadro'pi śrutvā kīdṛśamavasthāntaramanubhaviṣyatīti vepate me hṛdayam |

ido tado vi saṃbhamantā tāvasajaṇā dīsanti | ado
rāmabhaddo vi āacchaditti takkemi |itastato 'pi saṃbhramantastāpasajanā dṛśyante | ato rāmabhadro'pyāgacchatīti tarkayāmi |

lg.l:
saṃmṛjyantāṃ padavyaḥ karadhṛtakalaśāvarjitaistoyapūraiḥ
sicyantāmāsamantādaviralamabhitaḥ kīrṇapuṣpāḥ kriyantām |

jīvagrāhaṃ gṛhītvā kanakamṛgamasau jānakīprītihetoḥ
saṃprāptaḥ kānanāntātsamadhikamahimā satvaraṃ rāmabhadraḥ || 7 ||

śramajalalasadāsyaḥ śobhate cāpadaṇḍaṃ
śithilitaguṇabandhaṃ skandhadeśe dadhānaḥ || 8 ||

p.seg:
ae, kaṇaamiaṃ geṇhia antiattheṇa
lakkhaṇeṇa kiṃ vi mantaanto rāmabhaddo evva āacchadi | ahaṃ se maggaṃ
pariharia ciṭṭhāmi |aye, kanakamṛgaṃ gṛhītvāntikasthena lakṣmaṇena kimapi mantrayanrāmabhadra evāgacchati | ahamasya mārgaṃ parihṛtya tiṣṭhāmi |

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ
sp.p: vatsa, nūnamimaṃ kanakamṛgaṃ vilokya jānakī saviśeṣaṃ tuṣyati |

sp.speaker: lakṣmaṇaḥ
sp.p:
vacanamātreṇa devyāḥ kutūhalaṃ nivartayatastavāyaṃ prasāda
eva kanakamṛgalābhādapi mahāntaṃ paritoṣamāpādayati |

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ
sp.p:
nimittamabhinīya | vatsa, mahāmuneragastyasya sāmarthyādapa
gatasakalabhaye tapovane sakhyā madhukarikayā saha vartamānāmapi jānakīṃ
vicintya, aparicitapradeśatayā manaḥ śaṅkākulamāste |

sp.speaker: lakṣmaṇaḥ
sp.p: premaviśeṣo hi priyajane prathamaṃ pramādameva cintayati |

p.seg:
savvahā jadākadāvi kahaṇijjo jevva
so uttanto | tā gacchamhi | dāṇiṃ evva kahemi |sarvathā yadākadāpi kathanīya eva sa vṛttāntaḥ | tadgacchāmi | idānīmeva kathayāmi |

sp.speaker: lakṣmaṇaḥ
sp.p:
madhukarikāṃ dṛṣṭvā svagatam | ekākinī dīnamukhī madhuka
rikā samāgacchati | sarvathātyāhitena bhavitavyaṃ devyāḥ sītāyāḥ |

p.seg: jedu mahārāo |jayatu mahārājaḥ |

devva, tumhāṇaṃ devvaccaṇāe uḍaasamī
vaṭṭhidāsu ladāsu kusumāiṃ avaciṇomi tti ṇiggadā |deva, yuṣmākaṃ devārcanāyai uṭajasamīpasthitāsu latāsu kusumānyavacinomīti nirgatā |

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ
sp.p:
svagatam | kimataḥ paraṃ kathayiṣyatīti kampate me cetaḥ |
prakāśam | tatastataḥ |

p.seg:
maṇoharāiṃ kusumāiṃ dīsandi tti idaṃ kāṇaṇantaraṃ pa
viṭṭhā jāṇaī aṇṇesandīe mae ṇa diṭṭhā |manoharāṇi kusumāni dṛśyanta itīdaṃ kānanāntaraṃ praviṣṭā jānakī anveṣantyā mayā na dṛṣṭā |

lg.l: karṇaṃ praviṣṭāni haṭhādamūni sarvāṅgatāpaṃ janayanti hanta || 9 ||

ambājanaṃ ca pitaraṃ ca sahodarau ca
rājyaṃ ca tāni bhavanāni sabāndhavāni |

daivādvihāya vipine vasatāṃ tathāpi
hantātiduḥkhamaviṣahyamupāgataṃ naḥ || 10 ||
virahaṃ mama soḍhumakṣamā tvaṃ vanavīthīṣvapi māmanudrutāsi |

sp.speaker: lakṣmaṇaḥ
sp.p:
svagatam | imamāryaḥ paśyati cedatipīḍito bhaviṣyati |
tadenaṃ preṣayāmi | apavārya | madhukarike, imamuṭajaṃ naya | ahamāryasamīpe
tiṣṭhāmi |

p.seg: taha | iti niṣkrāntā | tathā |

sp.speaker: lakṣmaṇaḥ
sp.p: kimeva khidyase | idaṃ vanaṃ praviśyānviṣyadbhirdṛśyate devī |

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ
sp.p:
mandabhāgyayormama cakṣuṣorataḥparaṃ kutaḥ sītādarśanasukham |
tathāpi pratipādaya |

sp.speaker: lakṣmaṇaḥ
sp.p: ārya, sikatāvati pradeśe spaṣṭaṃ pratīyate devyāḥ padapaddhatiḥ |

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ

lg.l: pāṭalaṃ vinamitaṃ mukhāmbujaṃ bibhratīyamiha dṛśyate priyā || 15 ||
ayi muñca ruṣaṃ tava prasannaṃ jitapūrṇendu mukhāravindamastu |
praṇatiṃ kalayannahaṃ tvadīyāṃ padalākṣāṃ paripālayāmi mūrdhnā || 16 ||

sp.p:
lakṣmaṇaḥ — kaṣṭamāryasyonmādadaśā vartate | ārya, na jānakī | iti
mūrdhānamunnamayati |

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ
sp.p:
utthāya sthalapadminīṃ vilokya | madhubharanamitaprasūnāṃ mahītala
galitamakarandapānāya kamalodarādāpatantyā madhukaramālayā sa me tāmaruṇāṃ
sthalapadminīṃ vilokya mūḍho'smi |

lg.l:
vākyāni kānicidayuktatarāṇi vakti
brūte ca kānyapi tathāpi yathārthavanti |

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ

lg.l: tvāmāgateyaṃ padapaṅktirasyāḥ prayaccha me padmini padmavaktrām |
na cettadīyāṃ caraṇābjamudrāṃ pradarśayānyatra vinirgatāṃ me || 18 ||

sp.p:
vibhāvya | iyamapi calitakamalamukhasaṃjñayā padapaddhatimitaḥ prayātāmāve
dayati |

lg.l:
kisalayaparipāṭīṃ kiṃcidagre vidhunva
npratipadamupamanuyātaḥ paṅktibhiḥ ṣaṭpadānām |

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ

lg.l: sarvasya jagataḥ prāṇa iti tvāṃ bruvate vṛthā |
aṅgaṃ yadi priyāyāḥ spṛṣṭaṃ bhavatā śirīṣasukumāram |
bhramatā bhavatā dṛṣṭā kiṃ sā haṃsalasadgatiḥ || 22 ||

sp.p:
aye, priyāyā nisargasurabhiṇā mukhamārutena tiraskṛtatayā vairamanusmaraṃ
stūṣṇīmupayāsi |

lg.l:
mākandavṛndamakarandajaleṣu magnā
dhṛtvā ca paṅkajarajāṃsi madhuvratāliḥ |

sp.p:
kiṃ [ca] nirantaramadhurasāsvādamattānāmamīṣāṃ vacanamapramāṇameva | ataḥ
priyāgatirna praṣṭavyā | padāntaramabhinīya karṇaṃ dattvā | vatsa,

lg.l: avyaktavarṇaṃ kimapi bruvāṇā samutsukaṃ me hṛdayaṃ tanoti || 25 ||

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ
sp.p:
aye, priyālāpa iva śrūyate nākṛtistu dṛśyate | ataḥ
prārthayāmi |
kṣaṇamātraṃ tūṣṇīṃ sthitvā | ayi jānaki, kimityaudāsīnyaṃ bhajasi |

lg.l:
āgatya tūrṇamasitotpalaramyanetre
kaṇṭhaṃ badhāna mama te bhujavallarībhyām |

paścādupetya nibhṛtaṃ padamarpayantī
yadvā pidhehi nayane karapallavābhyām || 27 ||

sp.speaker: lakṣmaṇaḥ
sp.p: svagatam | kaṣṭaṃ pratīkāraduḥsthe karmaṇi kiṃ kurmaḥ |

sp.speaker: lakṣmaṇaḥ
sp.p:
ārya, eṣa kokilālāpaḥ śrūyate | nātra jānakī sā
jvalati (?) |

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ
sp.p:
netre nimīlya punaḥ karṇaṃ dattvā | sa evedānīṃ śrutavīṇāravasya ḍha
kkādhvaniriva kaṭhoratāṃ bhajati |

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ
sp.p:
vilokya sasaṃbhramam | vatsa, kecidamī corāḥ priyāyāḥ sarvā
bharaṇajātamādāya mastake dadhānāḥ prasāritabāhavo mayā yoddhumagrato niḥ
śaṅkamāsate | paśya paśya |

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ
sp.p:
bho bhoścorāḥ, tiṣṭhata | mamāgrataḥ kuto gamyate | idānīmeva
dhanurāropyaikenaiva sāyakena sarvānvaḥ pātayāmi | iti sāṭopaṃ parikramya
dhanurāropayati |

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ
sp.p:
vatsa, muñca muñca bāṇaṃ saṃdhāsyāmi | amī punaratraiva nirbhayā ni
ścalamāsate | iti tūṇīramukhādbāṇamuddhartumicchati |
ataḥ śarasaṃdhānaṃ vihāya vibhāvayatvāryaḥ, nātra corāḥ |

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ
sp.p: vibhāvya | aho, me mūḍhā matiḥ | tathā hi |

lg.l:
ārakto'yamaśokakuḍmalacayo no padmarāgacchaṭā
phullo'yaṃ navakarṇikāranikaro na svarṇabhūṣāvaliḥ |

eṣā ca sphuṭasindhuvārapaṭalī no mauktikānāṃ vrajaḥ
śākhājālabhṛtasta eva taravo nodyadbhujā dasyavaḥ || 30 ||

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ
sp.p:
tathā | iti padāntare sthitvā vilokya saharṣam | vatsa, dṛṣṭā
jānakī |

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ
sp.p: aye jānaki, etāvantaṃ kālaṃ kutra gatāsi | karṇaṃ dattvā | kiṃ

lg.l:
tvadālāpāḥ karṇe mama navasudhāśīkaramayā
stava sparśo'pyaṅge śiśiraśiśiraścandanarasaḥ |

śarajjyotsnāpūrastava vapuridaṃ me nayanayoḥ
kathaṃ te kalyāṇi kṣaṇamapi sahe hanta viraham || 32 ||

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ
sp.p:
nanviyamagrata evāste | iti puropasthitāṃ latāmupasṛtya vilokya |
aho me mohaḥ |

punarvilokya | vatsa, asyāmeva latāyāṃ puṣpāṇyavacitavatī jānakīti
tarkayāmi | tathā hi |

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ
sp.p: itaḥ paraṃ kāṃ diśaṃ prasthiteti vilokaya |

sp.speaker: lakṣmaṇaḥ
sp.p:
tathā | iti latāṃ paribhraman, maṇivalayaṃ vilokya, svagatam |
idaṃ devyāḥ karaparibhraṣṭam | tadāryasya hṛdayavinodanārthamavasare darśayāmi |
ityādāya paṭānte pidadhāti | upasṛtya prakāśam | ārya, netaḥparaṃ kutrāpi la
kṣyate pādamudrā | kiṃtu vane saṃcarataḥ kasyāpi mṛgasyātraivābhivyaktā pada
saraṇirālokitā |

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ

lg.l: mañjubhāṣiṇi mamākṣigocaraṃ kalpate tava kadā mukhāmbujam || 35 ||

sp.p:
parito'valokya | aye, priyāyāḥ kiṃcidapi vastu na lakṣyate | kenāhaṃ
hṛdayamavalambe |

sp.speaker: lakṣmaṇaḥ
sp.p:
ārya, devyāḥ karaparibhraṣṭamidaṃ maṇivalayam | tadavadhāra
yatvāryaḥ | iti dadāti |

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ

lg.l: kathamapi karapallavātpriyāyā maṇivalayaṃ patitaṃ mayādya labdham || 36 ||

etatpurā mama galaṃ paripīḍya gāḍhaṃ
cchinnaṃ vyadhatta bahuśaḥ parirambhaṇeṣu |

bimbādharaṃ mayi rasātpibati priyāyāḥ
kolāhalaṃ ca kṛtavatkaradhūnaneṣu || 37 ||

sp.p:
niḥśvasya | vatsa, kva jānakīṃ paśyāmaḥ | kutra vanāntaḥ punaranviṣyāmaḥ |
keṣu vā nikuñjeṣu punarvilokayāmaḥ | hanta, sarvathā nirāśāḥ smaḥ |

lg.l: bāḍhaṃ jagadidaṃ manye hyadya me priyayā vinā || 38 ||
āyātāḥ kati vā vayaṃ kathaya me

sp.speaker: lakṣmaṇaḥ
sp.p:
karṇaṃ dattvā saharṣaṃ vibhāvya | ārya, madhukarikāsametāṃ jānakīṃ
samāśvāsayankumbhasaṃbhavo maharṣirita evābhivartate |

sp.speaker: agastyaḥ
sp.p:
vatse, mā bhaiṣīḥ | ayamiha tvāmanviṣyannāste salakṣma
ṇo rāmabhadraḥ |

p.seg:
edehiṃ viloaṇehiṃ
ajjautto diṭṭho tti aho me bhāaheam |etābhyāṃ vilocanābhyāmāryaputro dṛṣṭa ityaho me bhāgadheyam |
jedu jedu ajjautto |jayatu jayatvāryaputraḥ |
jedu jedu mahārāo |jayatu jayatu mahārājaḥ |

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ
sp.p:
sītāṃ vilokya | vatsa, akāṇḍapatitasudhāvṛṣṭisadṛśaṃ sītā
darśanam |

sp.speaker: lakṣmaṇaḥ
sp.p:
ārya, evametat | agastyaṃ prati | bhagavan, atra latāmaṇḍape
muhūrtamāsanaparigrahaḥ kriyatām |

sp.speaker: agastyaḥ
sp.p: pūrvamatra vane durvāsāḥ kāniciddināni tapaḥ kṛtavān |

p.seg: sulahakovvo kkhu eso mahesī suṇiadi |sulabhakopaḥ khalveṣa maharṣiḥ śrūyate |

sp.speaker: agastyaḥ
sp.p:
tasminsamaye teṣu teṣvāśrameṣu tīvratapaḥśaṅkinā mahendreṇa
visṛṣṭānāṃ carantīnāṃ madhye hariṇī nāma kācidetattapovanaṃ praviśya puṣpā
ṇyavācinot |

sp.speaker: agastyaḥ
sp.p:
tataḥ paramabhiṣekāyāgacchannayaṃ durvāsāstāmavalokya “aye
hariṇi, yato'smaddevatārcanocitāni kusumānyavacinoṣi, tatastvannāmasadṛ
śīmevākṛtimehi” iti śaśāpa | tadānīmeva parityajya vanamidamantarhitaśca |

p.seg: amhahe, adiṇiṭṭhuradā tāvasāṇam |aho, atiniṣṭhuratā tāpasānām |

sp.speaker: agastyaḥ
sp.p:
tato hariṇībhūtāṃ hariṇīmādāyāsmadantikaṃ prāptābhirati
karuṇamākrandantībhirapsarobhirabhyarthitena mayā kṛpāvaśenābhimantritā dūrvā
muṣṭirarpitā | tasminvane nāsyāḥ pratyāsattirāsīt | ?

sp.speaker: agastyaḥ
sp.p:
ayamevādyāpyanuvartamānaḥ śāpo mahānasminvane kusumānya
vacinvantīṃ jānakīmaspṛśat |

p.seg:
tassiṃ evva samuvadiṭṭhāe hariṇīe hoda
vvam |tasminneva samupasthitayā hariṇyā bhavitavyam |

sp.speaker: agastyaḥ
sp.p:
ahamekākinīmasmadāśrame tiṣṭhantīmitastataḥ plavamānā
madṛṣṭapūrvāṃ hariṇīṃ samādhinā jānakīṃ niścitya tatkṣaṇameva śāpānmocayi
tvā bhavadantikamanaiṣam |

sp.speaker: agastyaḥ
sp.p:
anayā jānakyā lakṣmaṇena saha mahāntaṃ kālaṃ vartethāḥ |
api ca |

lg.l:
doṣadhvāntaṃ kṣālayantī narāṇā
mākalpāntaṃ nandayantī jaganti |

sp.speaker: rāmaḥ
sp.p: itaḥ paraṃ kiṃ priyamasti | tathāpīdamastu bharatavākyam |

lg.l:
samayavihitavarṣaḥ sasyapūrṇāṃ dharitrīṃ
janayatu jaladaughaḥ prerito vāsavena |

bhavajalanidhimadhye majjatāṃ mānavānāṃ
bhavatu taraṇirūpā saṃgatiḥ sajjanānām || 43 ||
